nasb.text: “You shall not bear a false report; do not join your hand with a wicked man to be a malicious witness.

esv.text: “You shall not spread a false report. You shall not join hands with a wicked man to be a malicious witness.

cnv.text: “不可傳播謠言，也不可與惡人攜手作假見證。

ccb.text: “不可散布谣言，也不可与恶人一起作伪证陷害别人。
